project_description: Build a command-line file management tool in Python using argparse. The tool should support five completely independent subcommands: (1) 'find' to search for files by name pattern, (2) 'stats' to display file size and modification date, (3) 'hash' to compute the SHA-256 hash of a file, (4) 'rename' to batch rename files using a regex pattern, and (5) 'duplicates' to find duplicate files by content hash. Each subcommand is self-contained with its own argument parsing and logic. There is no shared utility code or state between subcommands.

expected_subtasks.description: Implement find subcommand for file search by pattern
Implement stats subcommand for file info display
Implement hash subcommand for SHA-256 computation
Implement rename subcommand for batch renaming
Implement duplicates subcommand for finding duplicate files
